title: Hypixel Premium: Skyblock & PvP Lite
description: A lite version of the very popular Hypixel Premium series of modpacks for more performance on less performant machines like laptops with less mods.
body:
# Hypixel Premium: Lite
## The BEST modpack to use for your Skyblock and PvP needs especially for lower performance laptops and older PCs.

## We Have The BEST Performance

**This is the performance using my modpack**

![An island in skyblock showing almost 230 fps using this modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/704fbdda57fa6fd31f697bb85bf7624d1e8d7e5c.png)
**And this is Lunar Client's performance**
![An island in skyblock showing 208 fps using Lunar Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afd26385efd98f0d11b657d2ef716fe560114c89.png)

### This modpack is more performant than even Lunar Client!



### Advanced Gui

**This is an example of the built in item sell price trackers, these can also show lowest auction price and more!**

![An item description of a poisonous potato showing Bazaar price](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15481e46153113c9000e3a366c623d1071048027.png)


**If you don't need the performance and want even MORE features try out the original modpack**

[Hypixel Premium: PvP & Skyblock Original Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/hypixel-premium-pvp)

Credit to @EmblemBlue2 also known as Merchar2 for the idea and advise in creating this modpack as well as making the thumbnails for the Hypixel Premium series modpacks. You can check out his youtube here: [Emblem Blue YT](https://www.youtube.com/@EmblemBlue2).
